helios.differentiator: 7-ingredient epigenetic stack — doesn't just add protein, removes the genetic brakes on muscle growth
helios.mechanism_of_action: Epicatechin inhibits myostatin (MSTN) via follistatin upregulation. Phosphatidic acid activates mTOR. Turkesterone stimulates Akt pathway. Ecklonia cava crosses BBB for dual cognitive/metabolic effect.
proof_points: Epicatechin shown to inhibit myostatin in human skeletal muscle (Gutierrez-Salmean et al., 2014)
Turkesterone promotes protein synthesis via non-androgenic Akt pathway
Ecklonia cava phlorotannins: 8x antioxidant capacity vs green tea catechins
Phosphatidic acid activates mTOR signaling during resistance training

marine_phytoplankton.differentiator: Cellular-level nutrition from the ocean — all amino acids, omega-3s, chlorophyll in bioavailable microalgae form
marine_phytoplankton.mechanism_of_action: Phytoplankton provides raw nucleotides, trace minerals, and chlorophyll at sub-cellular bioavailability. Ecklonia cava seapolynol supports circulation and reduces oxidized LDL. Combined anti-inflammatory via Smad and IGF-1 pathways.
proof_points: Marine phytoplankton contains all 9 essential amino acids
Ecklonia cava reduces abdominal fat accumulation
Seapolynol lowers oxidized LDL and boosts antioxidant enzymes
Stimulates muscle cell growth through Smad and IGF-1 pathways

luna.differentiator: Cycle-synced hormonal support combining clinical estrogen metabolism (DIM/Vitex) with adaptogenic stress resilience (KSM-66/Maca/Shatavari)
luna.mechanism_of_action: DIM promotes healthy estrogen metabolism via 2-OH pathway. Vitex modulates pituitary prolactin. KSM-66 reduces cortisol. Maca supports libido through hypothalamic-pituitary axis. Evening primrose oil provides GLA for prostaglandin balance.
proof_points: DIM shown to shift estrogen metabolism toward less potent 2-OH metabolites
KSM-66 ashwagandha reduces cortisol by 30% in clinical trials
Vitex agnus-castus improves cycle regularity in meta-analysis
Maca gelatinized form improves female sexual function (Gonzales, 2010)

companion_audio_system.concept: Each Gaia's Legacy product ships with a QR code linking to a companion binaural audio session targeting the same biological pathways the supplement ingredients act on
companion_audio_system.technical_basis: Frequencies calculated from gene chromosomal positions using GOS constants (phi=1.618034, kappa=1.435). Stereo binaural beat encoding for brainwave entrainment. Weighted signal mixing for multi-pathway targeting.

ingredient_gene_map.Epicatechin 200mg: MSTN SILENCE — both inhibit myostatin via follistatin pathway

ingredient_gene_map.Ecklonia Cava 300mg (anti-inflam): IL6 SILENCE + TNF SILENCE — cytokine suppression

ingredient_gene_map.DIM 200mg: COMT SILENCE — estrogen catechol methylation pathway

delivery_methods: QR code on product packaging → hosted audio player
Email post-purchase → 'Your companion audio session is ready'
Suppz product listing → 'Includes companion binaural audio protocol'

gaia_brand_positioning.value_prop: Gaia's Legacy combines targeted supplement formulations with companion binaural audio protocols — chemical AND acoustic pathways to the same genes
gaia_brand_positioning.differentiator_vs_competitors: No other supplement brand pairs physical ingredients with frequency-matched companion audio targeting the same biological pathways
gaia_brand_positioning.cross_sell_with_suppz: Position Gaia's Legacy as the 'science tier' of Suppz — for customers who want mechanism-of-action transparency, not just 'GET HUGE' marketing
